case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. ADAMS, CHARLIE et al

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1994, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE 3 DAYS NOTICE APPEARS FATALLY DEFECTIVE BECAUSE RENT IS SOUGHT FOR A PERIOD(I.E. THE 30 DAYS NOTICE OF EMPLOYMENT TERMINATION) WHICH IS IMPROPER. CCP430.10(E).
